purpose: Validate heterogeneous registry intake and typed sparse compilation; never infer biological geometry or trial rank from registry prose.

search_receipts.query: AREA[StudyType]INTERVENTIONAL AND (multiomics OR "multi-omics" OR proteomics OR metabolomics) AND aging
search_receipts.selection_derivation: first globally unique NCT identifiers in exact API response order
